resources.string: Qala ukuskena nokususa kuwo wonke amathuluzi ngokucindezela inkinobho yesenzo yebhodi lokuphatha, ngaphandle kokuqinisekisa okwengeziwe.
Yimaphi amathuluzi okufanele afakwe emisebenzini yokucindezela kanye?
Lungisa ukuthi yimaphi amakhadi aboniswa nokuhlela kwawo
Ifayela elenziwe liqukethe ulwazi olubucayi (isib. amagama amafayela nezinhlelo zokusebenza ezifakiwe). Yabelane nalo kuphela nezinhlangothi ezithembekile.

Lesi sici sirekhoda konke okwenziwa yi-app kufayela elingabelwana. Ifayela elenziwe liqukethe ulwazi olubucayi (isib. amagama amafayela nezinhlelo zokusebenza ezifakiwe). Yabelane nalo kuphela nezinhlangothi ezithembekile (isib. umthuthukisi oxazulula inkinga).
I-SD Maid SE ilawula amafayela, izinhlelo zokusebenza nesitoreji.
Thola isikhala sesitoreji ngokuhlanza ngemuva kwezinye izinhlelo zokusebenza. Susa amafayela angadingeki futhi ukhiphe idatha esele.
Lena iwukwakha kwe-beta (ukuhlola). Qhubeka ngokunye kohleko kanye nesu lokweseka. Sicela ubike izinkinga ozibona.
I-SD Maid SE (okuyinto i-SD Maid 2) iyindlalifa ye-SD Maid (okuyinto i-SD Maid 1). Uhlelo olusha olulungiselelwe i-Android yanamuhla.

Ukwakheka kwangumuva kwayo kungaphezu kweminyaka engu-7 ubudala futhi akuklanyiselwe izinselelo zezinguqulo ze-Android ezintsha. Ukuklama kabusha okuphelele kwakudingeka ukuze kuqhutshekwe ukuthuthukiswa.
Cabanga ukushintshela ku-SD Maid SE ukuze uthole imiphumela engcono.

Isimo se-\"pro\" se-SD Maid 1 ngeshwa asikwazi ukudluliselwa ku-SD Maid 2/SE. Ngemuva kweminyaka engu-12 yezibuyekezo zamahhala, ukuthenga okusha kuyadingeka ukuze kuqhutshekwe ukuthuthukiswa (ukondla umthuthukisi).
I-SD Maid ayinayo izikhangiso futhi ayithengisi idatha yabasebenzisi.

Imibiko yamaphutha ithunyelwa lapho amaphutha enweba futhi ingase ibe nemininingwane mayelana nezinhlelo zokusebenza namafayela ohlelweni lwakho. Imibiko iyangisiza ukuthi ngilungise amaphutha futhi ngithuthukise uhlelo.
I-SD Maid izosesha zonke izindawo zedatha ezifinyelelekayo.
Lokho okufinyelelekayo kuncike kudivayisi yakho, inguqulo ye-Android nezimvume ezinikeziwe.
Qala ukusebenzisa i-SD Maid ngokusethwa ukufinyelela ezindaweni okufanele ziseshwe.
Yiba umxhasi wenze ukuqhubeka nokuthuthukiswa kube nokwenzeka.
Imodi esetshenziswayo lapho kufakwa indlela yokubuka uhlelo (isib. ubusuku noba imini).
Isitayela sombala esisetshenziswa lapho kufakwa indlela yokubuka uhlelo.
Bonisa ukubuka kuqala kwamafayela kuwo wonke amathuluzi (isib. izithombe ezincane zesithombe nevidiyo).
Khetha ulimi oluhlukile lwe-SD Maid, oluzimele kolimi lwakho lokuzenzakalela lohlelo. Njengamanje: %s
Funda imibhalo, bika izinkinga, xoxa nabanye noma rekhoda amalogi okuphephisa iziphazamiso.
Isixhumanisi esivulekile sezinkinga sokubika amaphutha nezicelo zeziqu.
Imibiko yeziphazamiso ezizenzakalelayo ayinabizo. Yabelana nge-ID yakho yokufaka uma umthuthukisi edinga ukuthola imibiko yakho yeziphazamiso.
Rekhoda konke uhlelo olukwenzayo kufayela lombhalo ongawabelana ngalo.
Lokhu kuzosusa unomphela zonke izeshini zemivala yokulungisa egciniwe. Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
Qedela ukusetshenziswa kwe-SD Maid ukuze uthole imiphumela engcono.
I-SD Maid izama ukulungisa izinkinga zokusetshenziswa.
Bonisa isikrini sokusetshenziswa futhi, kubandakanya nezinto eseziqediwe.
Ukusetshenziswa okwengeziwe kuyadingeka ukuze usebenzise lesi sici. Qedela izinyathelo zokusetshenziswa ezisele.
Thuthukisa imiphumela ngokunikela i-SD Maid ukufinyelela ezindaweni ezengeziwe.
Ezimweni eziningi iwindi lizokhuleka nendlela efanele esekhethiwe. Okufakiwe kuba luhlaza lapho kunikezwa ukufinyelela.
Uhlelo lokusebenza lwe-Documents UI alutholakali. Luyuhlelo lokusebenza lwesistimu olwakhiwe ngaphakathi kufanele lutholakale kuwo wonke amadivayisi e-Android.
Vumela i-SD Maid ukuthi iphathe isitoreji sakho.
Ukufinyelela okuyisisekelo esitorejini somphakathi, isib. \"Download/\" ne-\"DCIM/\", kodwa hhayi njalo \"Android/data\".
Ingabe i-SD Maid kufanele isebenzise ukufinyelela kwe-root uma kutholakala? Ukufinyelela kwe-root kungasetshenziswa ukuze kuhlolwe amafolda engeziwe esistimu nedatha yangasese yezinhlelo zokusebenza.
Kutholakala kuphela kumadivayisi ane-root. Uma ungenzanga lolu guquko, khona-ke idivayisi yakho ayinayo i-root futhi lesi silungiselelo asikho umthelela.
Vumela i-SD Maid ukuthi isebenzise i-Shizuku lapho kungenzeka khona ukuze ithuthukise imiphumela futhi inikeze amakhono.
Lesi silungiselelo asikho umthelela uma uhlelo lokusebenza lwe-Shizuku lungahlelwanga kudivayisi yakho.
I-Shizuku ngokuhlanganisa nokufinyelela kwe-root akuvuli amakhono engeziwe, kodwa kuthuthukisa ukwethembeka. I-SD Maid izokulisebenzisa njengendlela yokuphenduka.
Ungakuthola isikrini sokusetshenziswa futhi ngemenu yezilungiselelo.
Imvume yezibalo zokusetshenziswa inikeza ukufinyelela emininingwaneni eminingi yohlelo lokusebenza. I-SD Maid iyakusebenzisa ukuze inqume osayizi benqobo-cache engeziwe.
Kuyadingeka kwinsiza yokufinyelela esekelwe ekususweni kwe-cache.
Vumela i-SD Maid ukuthi ithumele izaziso ukuze ikwazise ngemisebenzi eqhubekayo noma izehlakalo ezibalulekile.
Lesi sici sidinga ukuqedela ezinye izinto zokusetshenziswa: %s
Insiza yokufinyelela ivumela i-SD Maid ukuthi ixhumane nesikrini sakho futhi izenzekelise izenzo ezikhathazayo, isib. ukuthepha \"Sula i-cache\" ezikriningi eziningi.
I-SD Maid ngeke isebenzise insiza yokufinyelela ngaphandle kwemvume yakho, izohlala ibonisa isikhombisi esibalulekile (esingucanselwa) ngenkathi isebenza futhi ngeke ikusebenzise ukuqoqa ulwazi.
Insiza inikwe amandla, kodwa ayisebenzi. Ivule/ivale noma uqalise kabusha idivayisi yakho. Hlola ukuthi i-SD Maid \"ayithuthukiswa\" yisistimu.
Uma insiza iqhubeka ikhubazeka ngemuva kwesikhathi, zama ukunika amandla inketho ye-\"Auto Start\" ye-SD Maid ezilungiselelweni zesistimu.
Nika amandla insiza futhi unikeze ukufinyelela
Uma ubona isithonjana esincane emngceleni wesikrini, khona-ke unike amandla inketho ye-\"shortcut\" ngephutha.
Uma ushintsha uqondo lwakho, ungaguqula lesi sinqumo futhi ngokungena ezilungiselelweni futhi uqalise kabusha ukusetshenziswa.

Awukwazi ukunika amandla insiza yokufinyelela ye-SD Maid? I-Android 13+ ingase ibeke imingcele ezinhlelweni zokusebenza ezingafakwanga nge-Google Play. Khipha le mingcele ephejini lemininingwane lesistimu ye-SD Maid. Inketho isemenu yomongo ekhoneni eliphezulu kwesokudla.
I-SD Maid idinga ukwazi ukuthi yiziphi izinhlelo zokusebenza onazo ukuze ithole amafayela angayona ayinhlelo lokusebenza elifakiwe.
Bheka imvume ebizwa ngokuthi \"Uhlu lwezinhlelo zokusebenza\" noma \"Buza wonke amaphakheji\".

Isistimu sinikeze uhlu olungavumelekile lwezinhlelo zokusebenza ezifakiwe (isib. zimbalwa kakhulu noma ezinye zazingekho). Iya ezilungiselelweni zesistimu futhi uvumele i-SD Maid ukuthi ifinyelele ku-\"Uhlu lwezinhlelo zokusebenza\".
I-SD Maid ayitholanga noma yiziphi izindawo zedatha ezingaskenwa. Ngabe uqedele ukusetshenziswa?
Nika amandla izinketho zokuhlola nokukhipha okuningi. Uhlelo lokusebenza luzosebenza kancane futhi lusebenze ngendlela ehlukile.
Ibika ngokuzenzekelayo izinkinga, isib. imininingwane mayelana nokuphahlazeka kohlelo lokusebenza ukuze ngikwazi ukuthola ukuthi kungani futhi ngikulungise.
Ukunika amandla uhlelo kuvumela ukuthi lusebenze futhi lungenza lubonakale esiqalisi sakho uma lunesenzo.
Ukukhubaza uhlelo kuvimbela ukusebenza kwalo futhi lukufihla emamenyu. Alukho ukulahlekelwa yidatha.
Vula lolu hlelo esitolo sezinhlelo zokusebenza lufakwe kuso.
Vula izilungiselelo zesistimu zedivayisi yakho zale nhlelo.
Khipha lolu hlelo kwezinye izinqubo ze-SD Maid.
Lolu hlelo manje lukhishwe kwethuluzi elilodwa noma ngaphezulu.
Osayizi bezinhlelo zokusebenza balinganiswa ngenxa yezizathu zokusebenza. Sebenzisa ithuluzi le-StorageAnalyzer ukuze uthole idatha enembile.
Beka ukukhulula isikhala ngesikhathi ugcina idatha yohlelo ukuze ibuyiswe kamuva.
Buyisela uhlelo olubekiwe esimweni esifakiwe ngokuphelele. Idatha yohlelo ilondolozwa.

plurals.name: appcontrol_toggle_confirmation_message_x
plurals.item: Shintsha isimo esinikwe amandla/esikhubazekile sohlelo olu-%d?
Shintsha izimo ezinikezwe amandla/ezikhubazekile zezinhlelo zokusebenza ezingu-%d?

resources.string: Thola isilinganiso esimfushane sosayizi sohlelo ngalunye.
Thola ukuthi uhlelo lusebenza (noma belisebenza kamuva).
Thola ukuthi yini ethatha isikhala kudivayisi yakho.
Isitoreji esiyinhloko sedivayisi yakho. Siqukethe ikhadi le-SD langaphakathi, isitoreji sangasese sezinhlelo zokusebenza nedatha yesistimu.
Isitoreji sesibili, ngokuvamile ikhadi le-SD elisusekayo. Siqukethe amafayela emidiya nedatha evela ezinhlelweni zokusebenza ezisisekelayo.
Isitoreji esiphathekayo, isib. i-flash drive enamathiselwe emnyangweni wakho we-USB.
Isikhala esihlalwa yizinhlelo zokusebenza ezifakiwe nedatha yazo (okuyinto, amafayela ezinhlelo zokusebenza, idatha nama-cache).
Izithombe ezithathiwe, amavidiyo arekhotiwe noma idatha elandiwe. Noma iyiphi idatha engeyona eyinhlelo lokusebenza elithile.
Izinhlelo zokusebenza zesistimu nedatha yesistimu. Izinhlelo zokusebenza nedatha kwabanye abasebenzisi, uma ama-akhawunti abasebenzisi ambalwa esetiwe kule divayisi.
Amafayela ohlelo, amathala ezincwadi nezinsiza. Lesi sikhala singakhululwa ngokususa uhlelo noma ngokusibekela (sitholakala kwinguqulo entsha ye-Android).
Amafayela emidiya avela kulo hlelo, isib. izithombe ze-WhatsApp ezitholiwe.
Idatha engeziwe lolu hlelo oluyibeke ngaphandle kwezindlela ezijwayelekile, isib. izithombe noma okwandiwe.

Izindawo zedatha zimele izindawo kudivayisi yakho ezingafinyelelwa yi-SD Maid. Izindawo zedatha ezahlukene zingase zitholakale kuye ngokuthi inguqulo yakho ye-Android nangokuthi yimaphi amavumelwano anikeziwe.
Izindawo i-SD Maid engayifinyelela ngokusekelwe emvumeni enikezwe manje.
Khetha amafayela nezinhlelo zokusebenza emisebenzini ye-SD Maid.
Engeza ukukhishwa okusha ngokuqala uvumele i-SD Maid iseshe bese usebenzisa imenyu yomongo emphumeleni ofuna ukukukhipha.
Ukukhishwa kwendlela kuvimbela i-SD Maid ekuqhubekeni nokucubungula noma yiziphi izindlela ezifanayo. Lokhu kusebenza kumafayela, amafolda namafolda angaphansi.
Ukukhishwa kohlelo kuvimbela i-SD Maid ekucubunguleni noma yimaphi amaphakheji afanayo.
Ukukhishwa okusekelwe kusegimenti kufana nokukhishwa kwendlela kodwa kuvumela ukufana okungaphelele. Isibonelo: \"DCIM/Camera\" kukhipha \"/sdcard/DCIM/Camera/photo.png\".
Sebenzisa ithuluzi le-AppControl ukudala ukukhishwa kohlelo.
Sebenzisa ithuluzi le-StorageAnalyzer ukudala ukukhishwa kwendlela.
Uhlu ngokulandelana kwesikhathi lwezenzo zakamuva nedatha ethintekile.
Izikhathi zokwenza ezilindelekile zilinganisela. Izinhlelo zingase ziphuziswe noma zisheshiswe uma kulondoloza ibhethri.
Uma idivayisi isemodi yokonga amandla, ukwenziwa okuhleliwe kuzoyeqwa.
Uma idivayisi ingashaji, ukwenziwa okuhleliwe kuzoyeqwa.
Faka izenzo ezisebenzisa insiza yokufinyelela. Lokhu kudinga ukuthi i-SD Maid ikwazi ukuxhumana nesikrini sakho (okusho ukuthi sivuliwe) lapho imisebenzi yenziwa.
Eminye imisebenzi ehleliwe yehlulekile noma yahlangabezana namaphutha. Zama ukuyiqhuba mathupha.
Imiyalo ye-Android shell ezokwenziwa ekugcineni kohlelo.
Cabanga ngokukhubaza ukulungiswa kwebhethri kwe-SD Maid uma uhlangabezana nezinkinga zokwenza ngemuva.
Isibuyekezo siyatholakala. Una-%1$s futhi inguqulo yakamuva ingu-%2$s.
I-SD Maid ihunyushwa amavolontiya. Ukuhumusha, ukubuyekeza noma ukufunda umbhalo, usizo lwakho luyathakaselwa!
Vumela i-SD Maid ukuthi ihlole imilayezo ebalulekile evela kumthuthukisi.
Vumela i-SD Maid ukuthi ihlole izibuyekezo ukuze ikwazise uma kunguqulo entsha etholakalayo.
Izinguqulo zangaphambi kokukhishwa zibonisa iribhini elincane esikriningi sokuqala. Zibuyekezwa kaningi, zingase zibe nezici eziningi, kodwa zingase futhi zibe namaphutha amaningi.

plurals.name: anniversary_card_body
plurals.item: Unyaka ongu-%1$d ndawonye kakade. Siyabonga ngokuthemba i-SD Maid ukugcina i-Android yakho ihlanzekile nahlanzekile. Isikhala esikhululiwe: %2$s
Iminyaka engu-%1$d niqine. Idivayisi yakho ihlala ihlanzekile futhi ihlanzekile nge-SD Maid. Isikhala esikhululiwe: %2$s

resources.string: Yabelana ngosuku lwakho olukhulu lwe-SD Maid

plurals.name: anniversary_share_text
plurals.item: Unyaka ongu-%1$d nge-SD Maid — Isikhala esikhululiwe: %2$s. Igcina i-Android yakho ihlanzekile. #SDMaid\nYizame: %3$s
Iminyaka engu-%1$d nge-SD Maid — Isikhala esikhululiwe: %2$s. Igcina i-Android yakho ihlanzekile. #SDMaid\nYizame: %3$s

plurals.name: stats_dash_body_count
plurals.item: Into engu-%s icutshungulwe selokhu wamema i-SD Maid kudivayisi yakho.
Izinto ezingu-%s zicutshungulwe selokhu wamema i-SD Maid kudivayisi yakho.

resources.string: Lungiselela izibalo ze-SD Maid, imibiko nokugcinwa kwedatha.
Inani lezinsuku ngaphambi kokususa imibiko eyisisekelo yokusebenza kwe-SD Maid.
Inani lezinsuku lokugcina imininingwane mayelana nezindlela ezithintwe yi-SD Maid.
Susa yonke imibiko bese usetha zonke izibalo ku-zero.
Bonisa isinqamuleli \"Sesha + Susa\" lapho ucindezela isikhathi eside isithonjana sohlelo. Sisebenzisa amathuluzi afanayo nebhodi lokuphatha lokucindezela kanye.

plurals.name: swiper_delete_confirmation_message
plurals.item: Lokhu kuzosusa unomphela %1$d ifayela (%2$s). Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
Lokhu kuzosusa unomphela %1$d amafayela (%2$s). Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.

plurals.name: swiper_delete_confirmation_message_partial_undecided
plurals.item: %d into enganqunyiwe izosala ukuze ibuyekezwe kamuva.
%d izinto ezinganqunyiwe zizosala ukuze zibuyekezwe kamuva.

resources.string: Bonisa igama lefayela, usayizi nosuku esikrinini sokuswayipha.
Dlidlizela lapho wenza izinqumo zokugcina noma zokususa.

plurals.name: swiper_dashcard_session_context
plurals.item: Qhubeka neseshini yosuku olungu-%1$d oludlule (%2$d%% kuqediwe)
Qhubeka neseshini yezinsuku ezingu-%1$d ezedlule (%2$d%% kuqediwe)

resources.string: Cindezela + ukukhetha ifolda bese uqala ukuswayipha
Thuthukela ukususa lezi zikhawulo nokusekela ukuthuthukiswa. Inguqulo yamahhala inemikhawulo:

Swayipha ifayela ngalinye ukuze uthathe isinqumo:

← Swayipha kwesokunxele: %1$s
→ Swayipha kwesokudla: %2$s
↑ Swayipha phezulu: Yeqa
↓ Swayipha phansi: Hlehlisa (ngemva kokuswayipha kokuqala)

Ungasebenzisa nezinkinobho ezingezansi.

Uma uqedile, thepha "Buyekeza" ukuze ubone zonke izinqumo zakho. Akukho okususwayo kuze kube uqinisekisa kusikrini sokubuyekeza.
Hlanza amafolda ngokushesha — swayipha amafayela ukuze ugcine, ususe, noma uyeqe.
Hlanza amafolda athile ngokushesha kunesiphequluli samafayela — swayipha nje ifayela ngalinye.

Buyekeza amafayela ngezinyathelo ezi-3 ezilula:

1. Khetha ifolda ozoyiskena
2. Swayipha amafayela ukuze ugcine, ususe, noma uyeqe
3. Buyekeza ukukhetha kwakho bese uqinisekisa

Akukho okususwayo kuze kube uthepha inkinobho yokugcina yokususa.
